TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: B. J. Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 9, B. J. Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) B. J. Armstrong htagan beh sa Detroit, Michigan.kawas tay 1985 tmasot pqwasan biru Brother Rice gocyu maki Bloomfield Township, Michigan. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: β. *. arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, β. *. arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) β. *. arms~ɕtroŋ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *etroit, miʦ~ʨħiɣan.kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βrotħer riʦ~ʨe ɣoʦ~ʨju maki βloom*iel* towns~ɕħip, miʦ~ʨħiɣan. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
S.FORM: B. J. Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 9, B. J. Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) B. J. Armstrong htagan beh sa Detroit, Michigan.kawas tay 1985 tmasot pqwasan biru Brother Rice gocyu maki Bloomfield Township, Michigan. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: β. *. arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, β. *. arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) β. *. arms~ɕtroŋ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa *etroit, miʦ~ʨħiɣan.kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βrotħer riʦ~ʨe ɣoʦ~ʨju maki βloom*iel* towns~ɕħip, miʦ~ʨħiɣan. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
